pi_items.source: Code analysis of verifier.py (line 50) and Maven Central Repository verification
Code analysis of verifier.py (line 65) and Airbnb lottie-android official documentation
Direct URL verification via curl; file is accessible and contains valid Lottie JSON (v4.10.1, 60fps, 400x400 canvas, named 'AndroidWave')

pi_items.verified_value: 6.3.0 exists and is a valid release in Maven Central Repository; 6.7.1 is the latest version as of 2025
pi_items.source: Maven Central Repository (mvnrepository.com) and Web search; described in task description line 1

privileged_info_summary: The task integrates Lottie 6.3.0 (a valid release available in Maven Central) into an Android app project. The animation asset 'android_wave.json' (lowercase naming in task) is downloaded from the official Airbnb lottie-android GitHub repository at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/airbnb/lottie-android/master/sample/src/main/assets/AndroidWave.json. The animation file is a valid Lottie JSON (format version 4.10.1) with 60 fps frame rate, 123 frames duration, and 400x400 pixel canvas, depicting an 'AndroidWave' animated character. The project paths, XML tags (com.airbnb.lottie.LottieAnimationView), and dependency specifications are all accurate. Data source is real, from the official Airbnb open-source repository.
